name: Vaultbreakers
specialty: Cunning thieves known for their ability to bypass any security and retrieve the most elusive treasures from deep within the city's vaults

members.name: Zara Valtor
members.note: A master of disguise, her face changes as often as her gowns

members.name: Krak'thos
members.note: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, he defected to the Serpent Choir after a personal betrayal

members.name: Gideon Stonefoot
members.note: Has a knack for talking his way out of tight situations, but his past with the Wardens of Ash is a constant tension

visual: Clad in black leather and hooded cloaks, they move with a silent grace through the crowded streets, their eyes constantly scanning for opportunities. A small, intricate serpent symbol is tattooed on each member's wrist.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity: 'Don't cross the Vaultbreakers, or they'll break into your vault'.
